message.content: The image does not show any tool cards or tool items. It only displays sections with headings and descriptions (e.g., "Five Steps to Growth", "Built for Founders & Creatives", "Pro Tools for T-Shirt Printers", "Print & DTF/DTG", "Design") but no visible tool cards with icons or titles. Therefore, none of the specified tools (original or newer) are visible, and there are no tool cards to list.
